get_provider: get a configured AI provider by ID or use the default provider from config
Provider_complete: send a completion request to an LLM provider with retry logic and exponential backoff
Provider_stream: stream a completion from an LLM provider yielding chunks as they arrive
parse_tool_calls_from_text: parse tool calls embedded in text content from open-source models like Qwen or Hermes
list_providers: list all available AI providers registered in the provider registry
